diagnosis: ast, right, Wide local excision: Invasive ductal carcinoma, Nottingham grade 2 (of 3), forming a 2.5 x 2.1 x 1.0 em mass(AJCC 2). Ductal carcinoma in situ, solid type, without necrosis and high nuclear grade identified. Angiovascular invasion present. After, re-excision of inferior and deep margins, all margins are negative by at least 1.0 cm, Skin ellipse identified without abnormality. Lymph nodes, right (AICC pN1). illary sentinel, excision: Multiple (2 of 5) sentinel lymph nodes are positive for metastatic breast carcinoma Lymph nodes, right lary, excision: Multiple (7) right axillary lymph nodes are negative for tumor.
